en: An oracle concerning Moab. Because Ar of Moab is laid waste in a night, Moab is undone; because Kir of Moab is laid waste in a night, Moab is undone.
zh: 關於摩押的默示： 一夜之間，摩押的亞珥受到蹂躪，就滅亡了！ 一夜之間，摩押的基珥受到蹂躪，也滅亡了！

en: He has gone up to the temple, and to Dibon, to the high places to weep; over Nebo and over Medeba Moab wails. On every head is baldness; every beard is shorn;
zh: 他們進入房子 ，又往底本，上到高處去哭泣， 摩押人為尼波和米底巴哀號； 各人頭上都光禿，鬍鬚剃淨。

en: in the streets they wear sackcloth; on the housetops and in the squares everyone wails and melts in tears.
zh: 他們在街上都腰束麻布； 在房頂上，在廣場上， 各人都哀號，流淚痛哭。

en: Heshbon and Elealeh cry out; their voice is heard as far as Jahaz; therefore the armed men of Moab cry aloud; his soul trembles.
zh: 希實本和以利亞利都呼喊， 他們的聲音達到雅雜， 因此摩押配帶武器的人大聲呼叫， 各人的心都戰兢。

en: My heart cries out for Moab; her fugitives flee to Zoar, to Eglath-shelishiyah. For at the ascent of Luhith they go up weeping; on the road to Horonaim they raise a cry of destruction;
zh: 我的心為摩押哀號， 它的逃民一直去到瑣珥，如同一頭三歲大的牝牛，要掙脫苦軛， 他們登上魯希的山坡，隨走隨哭， 他們在何羅念的路上，發出滅亡的哀號。

en: the waters of Nimrim are a desolation; the grass is withered, the vegetation fails, the greenery is no more.
zh: 因為寧林的眾水都已荒涼， 青草枯乾，嫩草滅沒， 完全沒有青綠之物。

en: Therefore the abundance they have gained and what they have laid up they carry away over the Brook of the Willows.
zh: 所以，他們把所得的和所積蓄的財富， 都帶過了柳樹溪。

en: For a cry has gone around the land of Moab; her wailing reaches to Eglaim; her wailing reaches to Beer-elim.
zh: 哀號的聲音傳遍了摩押四境， 哀聲直達以基蓮，又傳到比珥．以琳。

en: For the waters of Dibon are full of blood; for I will bring upon Dibon even more, a lion for those of Moab who escape, for the remnant of the land.
zh: 底們 的水充滿了血， 我還要把更多的災禍加給底們， 使獅子臨到摩押逃難的人和那地餘下的人中間。
